props.description: Change the visual style of the progress bar.
props.title: appearance

props.description: Applies a box shadow to the progress bar fill using the appearance color.
props.title: boxShadow

props.description: Custom height for the progress bar. Any valid CSS height value.
props.title: height

props.description: Change the background color of the progress bar track.
props.title: backgroundColor

props.description: Width of the skeleton. Useful when the skeleton is inside an inline element with no width of its own.
props.title: width

props.description: Height of the skeleton. Useful when you don't want to adapt the skeleton to a text element but for instance a card.
props.title: height

props.description: This is an attribute used to identify a DOM node for testing purposes.
props.title: data-testid
